expectations.text: Announces 'Starting jira-ticket protocol for WEBR-698' at the start

expectations.text: Calls getJiraIssue with ticket key WEBR-698
expectations.evidence: Transcript confirms MCP call attempted with issueIdOrKey: WEBR-698
No branch created — MCP blocked before git was reached. Eval environment limitation.

expectations.text: Tier is assessed as Complex (Story + 1 AC + unset points falls through to default - reveals tier logic gap)
expectations.evidence: No tier assessed — Steps 2 and 3 not executed due to MCP block.

expectations.text: Prints summary table containing Ticket, Type, Branch, and Tier fields
expectations.evidence: No summary printed — execution halted at Step 1.

expectations.text: Tier reason mentions unset story points or mixed signals
expectations.evidence: No tier reasoning produced — ticket data unavailable.

summary.note: 4 failures are eval environment limitations. The tier logic gap (Story+1AC+unset points defaulting to Complex) is a real bug confirmed by static analysis but could not be tested live.
